female_character_face: Striking dark eyes with flushed cheeks

scenes.plot: Isabella reclines on a velvet daybed, admiring her corset, as Kael enters the dim room to admire her silhouette.
Kael leans in for a deep kiss, Isabella arching her back in anticipation, legs slightly tangled.
Kael pushes Isabella down, entering her from behind on the bed, her hands clutching the duvet.
Rhythmic grinding begins, Kael lifting her hips to maximize depth while Isabella reaches for his hair.
She lifts her knees to his shoulders, transitioning from lying to a more vertical angle, Kael following her lead.
Now in a standing position, Isabella straddles Kael at the edge of the bed, her heels grinding against his chest.
Isabella drops forward onto the mattress, Kael kneeling behind her to catch her weight, legs wrapping around him.
He thrusts upward to meet her, Isabella riding him in place, sweat glistening on both their bodies.
They fall back to the side, Kael supporting Isabella's weight against his chest, legs locked together tightly.
Post-coital bliss, Isabella tracing the line of Kael's spine, both resting in the warm, fading candlelight.
